name: UV Shield Pro Sunglasses
description: Premium UV400 polarized lenses protect your eyes from harmful sun rays while keeping you stylish all summer long. Lightweight titanium frame with scratch-resistant coating and anti-glare technology. Perfect for beach days, hiking, or city strolls.

name: Floral Breeze Sundress
description: Light and breezy floral sundress crafted from 100% organic cotton. Features adjustable spaghetti straps, a flattering A-line silhouette, and a vibrant tropical print that captures the essence of summer. Machine washable and wrinkle-resistant.

name: SPF 50+ Glow Sunscreen
description: Reef-safe, mineral-based broad-spectrum sunscreen with SPF 50+ protection. Enriched with hyaluronic acid and vitamin E for hydrating, non-greasy coverage. Water-resistant for up to 80 minutes. Suitable for all skin types including sensitive skin.

name: Beach Paradise Tote Bag
description: Extra-large waterproof beach tote bag with enough room for towels, sunscreen, snacks, and all your beach essentials. Features an insulated inner pocket for drinks, mesh side pockets, and a reinforced bottom. Sand-resistant lining makes cleanup a breeze.

name: Aqua Sport Flip Flops
description: Ultra-comfortable sport flip flops designed for beach and pool use. Features a contoured footbed with arch support, quick-dry foam insole, and non-slip rubber sole. Adjustable strap fits all foot shapes. Available in vibrant summer colors.

name: Aloha Surf Board Shorts
description: Performance surf board shorts made from recycled ocean plastic. Quick-dry 4-way stretch fabric allows full range of motion in and out of the water. Features a secure drawstring waistband, side pocket, and a back zip pocket. UPF 50+ sun protection built into the fabric.

name: Cooling Mist Face Spray
description: Refreshing thermal water face mist that instantly cools and hydrates skin during hot summer days. Enriched with rose water, aloe vera, and vitamin C for a revitalizing burst of moisture. Travel-friendly size fits in any beach bag. No parabens, alcohol-free formula.

name: Straw Sun Hat
description: Handwoven natural straw sun hat with a wide 4-inch brim for maximum sun protection. Features an adjustable inner band for a perfect fit and a stylish ribbon detail. Packable design means it bounces back to shape after folding. UPF 50+ certified.
